assertions.assertion: The plan explicitly references reusing common/src/db/query.rs::apply_filter for comma-separated multi-value query parameter parsing rather than writing new parsing logic (constraint 5.4)
assertions.evidence: plan.md and reuse-analysis.md both reference apply_filter by full path. reuse-analysis.md: 'apply_filter accepts a SeaORM column reference and a raw query-parameter string and returns a SeaORM Condition.' plan.md: 'No bespoke parsing code is written in this file; all multi-value splitting is delegated to apply_filter inside the service.'

assertions.assertion: The plan references following the filter pattern from modules/fundamental/src/advisory/endpoints/list.rs as a structural guide for implementing the license filter
assertions.evidence: plan.md: 'mirroring the Query struct pattern used in modules/fundamental/src/advisory/endpoints/list.rs for severity'. reuse-analysis.md Reuse Candidate 2 provides full structural comparison of the advisory list endpoint's severity filter pattern.

assertions.assertion: The plan references using entity/src/package_license.rs for the JOIN query rather than writing raw SQL or creating a new entity
assertions.evidence: plan.md: 'use entity::package_license for the typed SeaORM JOIN and column reference'. reuse-analysis.md: 'The entity’s Column::LicenseId is passed directly to apply_filter as the column reference. The entity’s Relation::Package is used for the JOIN definition.' Explicitly states no raw SQL or new entity.

assertions.assertion: The reuse analysis covers all 3 Reuse Candidates from the task description, explaining how each would be applied
assertions.evidence: reuse-analysis.md has 3 dedicated sections: 'Reuse Candidate 1: common/src/db/query.rs::apply_filter', 'Reuse Candidate 2: modules/fundamental/src/advisory/endpoints/list.rs', 'Reuse Candidate 3: entity/src/package_license.rs'. Each includes what the candidate provides, where it is used, and why it is used. A coverage matrix at the end confirms all 3 are covered.

assertions.assertion: All files listed in the plan are within the scope defined by the task's Files to Modify and Files to Create sections (constraint 5.1)
assertions.evidence: Plan modifies: package/endpoints/list.rs, package/service/mod.rs; creates: tests/api/package_license_filter.rs. All match task scope. 'Out-of-Scope' section explicitly excludes: endpoints/mod.rs, entity/src/package_license.rs, common/src/db/query.rs, package/model/summary.rs.

assertions.assertion: The plan does not propose creating new utility functions that duplicate the functionality of apply_filter (constraint 5.4)
assertions.evidence: plan.md Out-of-Scope: 'No new utility functions that duplicate apply_filter functionality.' reuse-analysis.md: 'No functionality duplicating any of the three is introduced anywhere in the implementation.'
